name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-extensions-react-access-lens
title: Access Lens
shortDescription: Inspect SharePoint document library permissions from the command bar.
longDescription: Access Lens is a read-only SharePoint Framework ListView Command Set for modern SharePoint Online document libraries.

It adds an Inspect Access command to the document library command bar and opens a right-side panel with permission inheritance, effective permission source, web and library role assignments, visible SharePoint group members, risk indicators, and export options.

The sample runs entirely in the browser, uses the current SharePoint context and PnPjs, and does not require Microsoft Graph permissions, admin consent, a backend service, external storage, or telemetry.

references.name: Overview of SharePoint Framework Extensions
references.description: Use SharePoint Framework Extensions to extend the SharePoint user experience, including toolbars and list views.

references.name: Build your first ListView Command Set extension
references.description: Learn how to create a SharePoint Framework ListView Command Set extension.

references.name: PnPjs documentation
references.description: PnPjs provides fluent APIs for working with SharePoint and Microsoft 365.
